title: cymophyllus fraserianus
intro: Cymophyllus fraserianus, also known as Fraser's sedge or Fraser's cypress sedge, is a type of plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae) native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cymophyllus fraserianus include its ability to treat various ailments, such as coughs, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a digestive aid. Cymophyllus fraserianus is typically used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by drying and processing the plant's leaves and stems.
